Hello,

It is my pleasure to announce the release of two new models for RLP (blocks4h and peak/off-peak) 🎉 They will be added in the KPI meeting as from June.

These new models were built both to tackle the data quality issues coming from the DGO, as well as improve the model accuracy. All in all, we expect a 1% MAPE improvement (*).

@Metten, David I propose we wait for a couple of days to see the actual results, but let me know when and how you want to integrate them in Metrix (it can be added to he current export).

I would like to take this occasion to thank all the parties involved, from Forecasting for the feedback and meticulous review of the results, to the DI team for the critical review of the experiments and code.

Together we make the difference.

Best,
Jean-Michel
